name: Indiana
description:
Indiana had always been a bit of a loner, and he enjoyed his own company. He loved to watch movies, basketball, everything about the franchise of indiana jones captivated him. And he loved basketball, too - the fast pace and the energy of the game appealed to him. he wasn;t interested in playing basketball, he just likes watching the games. He’s laid back most of the time.

he also has a crush on illinois springfield, silently
creator: TetrisTetrovich
